chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-2087 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 16-04-2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Thaheem, Advocate along with petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G, Sindh.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner along with his counsel is present and does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
